Description: Uncovered a JSON Web Token, which may lead to unauthorized access to web applications and sensitive user data.
Author: Dines
Message:
docs: update dashboard with the first fully green CI run's real results

219/219 Website E2E, 406/406 Backend & Security, 74/74 Mobile App E2E
(all 8 accessibility/error-handling findings fixed, all 13 live Appium
cases passing), 397/400 API Load Test (the 3 real failures are SQLite
write-lock contention under 100 concurrent users hitting write
endpoints through 4 worker processes - an expected CI-environment
limitation since CI uses local SQLite rather than production Postgres,
not a code defect).

Every job in the workflow passed for the first time this session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: Uncovered a JSON Web Token, which may lead to unauthorized access to web applications and sensitive user data.
Author: Dines
Message:
docs: update dashboard - all four suites at 100% for the first time

219/219 Website E2E, 406/406 Backend & Security, 74/74 Mobile App E2E,
400/400 API Load Test. The load test's remaining failures (SQLite
write-lock contention under 100 concurrent users) are gone after
enabling WAL mode - 10,129 real requests, 0 errors, and throughput
improved too (166.8 req/sec vs ~130, avg latency 586ms vs ~750ms).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: Uncovered a JSON Web Token, which may lead to unauthorized access to web applications and sensitive user data.
Author: Dines
Message:
ci: replace CSV-replay test theater with real E2E, load, and security testing

The existing pipeline read pre-written rows out of a static CSV and
reprinted them as PASS for every suite (Selenium, Appium, load test) -
no browser, device, or real HTTP load was ever involved, which is why
every run showed 100% pass and wildly inflated counts (e.g. 7,583 "load
tests"). Replaces all four suites with genuine execution:

- Backend & Security: 406 real scenarios (auth/injection/boundary/CORS/
  method checks) against a live local FastAPI + SQLite backend. Found
  and fixed a real 500 on POST /auth/register/reset-password (missing
  bcrypt 72-byte length guard, unlike the register endpoint).
- API Load Testing: real 100-VU/60s concurrent load test. Uncovered
  that the backend fails ~91% of requests as a single uvicorn worker
  (sync route handlers exhaust the ~40-slot threadpool) - matches the
  existing backend/load_test_results.csv finding. Multi-worker mode
  fixes it (0% errors, ~105 req/sec); CI now runs load tests that way
  and documents the single-worker regression as a known issue.
- Website E2E: real Selenium sessions (Chrome + Firefox) against the
  actual running React app and backend - real login/register flows,
  form validation, navigation, responsive checks, and a live chat
  round-trip through the backend.
- Mobile App E2E: added testID props across the auth screens (none
  existed before, so Appium had nothing reliable to locate) plus a
  real static-analysis suite that reads the actual RN source and found
  genuine gaps (6 screens with zero accessibility labels on touchable
  elements, 2 screens with unhandled async calls). CI now also builds
  a real debug APK, boots an Android emulator, and runs live Appium
  against it, uploading the APK as a downloadable build artifact.

generate_unified_report.py now builds the dashboard from these suites'
real JSON output instead of re-slicing the old CSV.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: Uncovered a JSON Web Token, which may lead to unauthorized access to web applications and sensitive user data.
Author: Dines
Message:
docs: update dashboard with the first fully clean CI run's real results

219/219 Website E2E, 406/406 Backend & Security, 397/400 API Load Test,
66/74 Mobile App E2E (static 61/61 minus the 8 genuine accessibility/
error-handling findings, plus all 13 live Appium cases passing for the
first time - real registration through the actual 3-step Register
screen, submitted to a real local backend over 10.0.2.2, all 5 tabs,
swipe, rotation-lock check, background/resume, deep link, back button).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Author: Dines
Message:
ci: merge real suite results into one QA_Test_Report_Live.csv

Adds a single combined CSV (1,086 real rows across all four suites,
tagged by Component) alongside the per-suite JSON/CSV files, matching
the shape of the old QA_Test_Report_4400_final.csv but built from
actual suite runs instead of replayed fixture data.
